caption.full:
Evil Dead Burn haunted house coming to Halloween Horror Nights

A new haunted house based on the upcoming film Evil Dead Burn is headed to Universal's Halloween Horror Nights. The attraction will open at both Universal Orlando Resort and Universal Studios Hollywood. Evil Dead Burn is directed and co-written by Sébastien Vaniček.

What are your predictions for the Evil Dead Burn haunted house?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #HalloweenHorrorNights #EvilDead #SébastienVaniček

youtube.title: Evil Dead Burn Haunted House: New Film Attraction
youtube.description:
Evil Dead Burn is getting a haunted house at Universal's Halloween Horror Nights. The attraction opens in late August and early September at Universal Orlando Resort and Universal Studios Hollywood. The film, directed by Sébastien Vaniček, is the sixth installment in the Evil Dead franchise.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
